docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,073.19 FILED BY PEACOCK JEWELERS AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS SANDRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-25-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
